## Description

Provide a clear description of the changes introduced by this pull request. Explain the rationale, design decisions, and any associated context.

Fixes # (issue reference)

---

## Type of Change

Please check the options that apply:

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring / performance optimization

---

## Checklist

Before submitting this PR, please verify:

- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project (run `pnpm run format`).
- [ ] My changes compile and generate no new compiler warnings (run `pnpm run build`).
- [ ] Lint checks pass successfully with no errors (run `pnpm run lint`).
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix or feature works as intended (run `pnpm run test`).
- [ ] Target code coverage parameters are met.
- [ ] All commits follow the Conventional Commits guidelines.
- [ ] My changes do not introduce any security or oracle validation vulnerabilities.

---

## Testing Details

Describe the tests run to verify the changes (e.g., unit tests, invariant tests, local Base fork simulations).
